description: Local reference-document database for analog PFC controllers. One folder per controller under controllers/<id>/. General control-loop / compensator design theory (controller-agnostic) lives under _common/. A database agent should resolve a controller id, read its 'documents', and also consult the relevant 'common' collections.

fan9672.name: onsemi FAN9672
fan9672.summary: Two-Channel Interleaved CCM PFC Controller — analog, average-current-mode. Primary analog controller targeted by this project's control-design step (Step 16).

documents.title: FAN9672 — Two-Channel Interleaved CCM PFC Controller
documents.use_for: Pin functions, electrical characteristics, internal blocks (VEAO/IEAO, multiplier, current sense, gain constants), application schematic — the authoritative part reference.

documents.title: Design Guideline for 3-Channel Interleaved CCM PFC Using the FAN9673 5 kW CCM PFC Controller
documents.note: Written for the sibling part FAN9673 (3-channel). The interleaved-CCM-PFC design methodology (power-stage sizing, current/voltage loop compensation) applies directly to the FAN9672 (2-channel).
documents.use_for: Step-by-step interleaved CCM PFC power-stage and control-loop design worked example.

documents.title: Average Current Mode Interleaved PFC Control — Theory of Operation and Control-Loop Design
documents.author: Petr Frgal
documents.use_for: Average-current-mode interleaved PFC theory, current and voltage loop transfer functions and compensator derivation.

documents.title: AND9925 — FAN9672/FAN9673 Tips and Tricks
documents.use_for: Practical design tips for the FAN9672/9673 — R_CS Method-2 (Eq. 11), gain-modulator (GMOD) checks, and operating-point verification used in Steps 6–7.

documents.title: FAN9672 Control Loop Design Report (Rev 2.1)
documents.use_for: Worked control-loop design example for this project's FAN9672 application — derived component values and design rationale the agent can cite/replicate.

documents.title: FAN9672 Control Design Tool v4
documents.use_for: Interactive FAN9672 control-design calculator (same engine served at /control_design.html). Reference for the implemented design equations and component-selection logic.

control_loop_design.summary: Controller-agnostic control-loop / compensator design theory. Applicable to any analog controller's voltage/current loop design.

documents.title: Average Current Mode Control of Switching Power Supplies
documents.author: Lloyd Dixon
documents.use_for: Foundational average-current-mode control theory and loop design.

documents.title: Control Loop Design (Power Supply Design Seminar 800, Topic 7)
documents.use_for: General control-loop design seminar — poles/zeros, crossover, phase margin.

documents.title: Demystifying Type II and Type III Compensators Using Op-Amp and OTA for DC/DC Converters
documents.author: SW Lee
documents.use_for: Type-II / Type-III compensator topologies and component-value equations (op-amp and OTA).

documents.title: Practical Feedback Loop Design Considerations for Switched Mode Power Supplies
documents.author: Hangseok Choi, Ph.D.
documents.use_for: Practical feedback-loop design considerations, measurement and stability margins.
